sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89776" key="prosne/w2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσνέω</orth> (B), <sense id="n89776.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">heap up against</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ξύλα ταῖς θύραις</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.775e</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
